issue_exact_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Fryerplate Cleaver: a broad butcher cleaver forged from greasy diner chrome, with a squared blade, fryer-basket perforations, and warning-red handle wrap. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Use only named fowl-harvest-24 colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
prompt:
TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block — no gradients, anti-aliasing, blur, dithering, metallic sheen.

ONE small centered Fryerplate Cleaver inventory item in three-quarter view. Shrink the whole object: the entire cleaver including handle must fit inside roughly a 24×20 logical-pixel bounding box, centered, with at least FIVE full magenta cells of empty space on every edge. It must look like a compact inventory glyph, not a large prop.

Identity: broad squared butcher cleaver blade with a few oil-ink fryer-basket hole dots; short handle with condiment-red wrap.

COLOR LOCK exact hex only (no other colors):
- blade fill: storm-slate #55586a ONLY (dark blue-grey bricks — NEVER light grey/silver/chrome)
- highlight rim: diner-cream #f3d897 (thin)
- holes + outline: oil-ink #111018
- handle wrap: condiment-red #c83d3d

Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Members ≥3 px thick. No Character, duck, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, transparency.
note: Unregistered interim Fowl Equipment source family for #394; no registry/runtime activation in this slice.
